message:
chore(beads): mark gi4oy in_progress (health p50=132ms follow-up after d0rmo)

gi4oy tracks the remaining 2.6× overrun vs the <50ms health budget
after d0rmo's COUNT(*) skip took p50 from 296ms → 132ms. Lists
the four remaining likely hot paths in state_meta_json
(probe_index_run_lock, asset_state::inspect_search_assets,
responsiveness + parallel_wal_shadow telemetry snapshots) and
three candidate fixes (asset snapshot TTL cache, skip semantic
asset inspection in health parallel to the COUNT skip, or
re-evaluate the README budget against real-world corpora). Moves
from open to in_progress to reflect that an agent is now profiling
the residual overhead against the seeded large-DB fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
